description: Industrial Logistics Properties Trust is a real estate investment trust focused on owning and leasing high quality industrial and logistics properties. As of March 31, 2026, ILPT's portfolio consisted of 409 properties containing approximately 59.6 million rentable square feet located in 39 states. Approximately 77% of ILPT's annualized rental revenues as of March 31, 2026, are derived from investment grade tenants, tenants that are subsidiaries of investment grade rated entities or Hawaii land leases.
